package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerDatabaseAccessCountQueryBeforePagedFetch() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_database_access_count_query_before_paged_fetch"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Database access. Flag count queries paired with page fetches on every request without cache or user-visible need."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
